changes: Auto Jobs: complete rewrite â€” a single orchestrator runs the acceptâ†’complete pipeline over pure WebSocket, with the old DOM-driven flows removed. SAI jobs (ip injection/cleanup, file elimination, log deletion/download, data download/upload, decrypt extract) and file decryption now run headless.
Auto Jobs: accepts and works one server at a time (sequential), holding while a server's batch is still in flight so a stuck or inaccessible server can't block the others.
Auto Jobs: hacks not-accessible servers automatically over WebSocket when there is no Active Access grant, installing covering HACK software via the headless loadout API.
Auto Jobs: file decryption opens files directly over WebSocket (desktop.open.file) and auto-installs/swaps the matching DECRYPT software for the file type.
Auto Jobs: new Master Switches panel â€” global market and job-type toggles, plus an opt-in auto-dismiss of FAILED jobs (default off).
Auto Jobs: Job List now surfaces FAILED and 'ready to complete' jobs, adds a manual âś“ complete button, and a Job details panel showing the raw WebSocket payload.
Auto Jobs: added USOL (URM7-M) market support across all modules.
Network Map: rebuilt the popup map to match the in-game cor3.gg look, with pan/zoom; K/D servers dominate the hack indication and block Open SAI.
Expeditions: full tab rework â€” master switch, min/max auto-send latch, a rich roster/stash/runs view, and a profile/credits tracker.
Expeditions: EVENT-pause-aware active timer that matches the in-game countdown â€” starts at departure, accrues pauses, and snaps to the game's end time.
Expeditions: auto-opens the loot container on a full-success run (master-gated), with retry-safe open/collect.

ICE WALL solver: multi-anchor matching, flicker-free diff overlay, anchor-lock commit priority to stop wrong partial clicks, and an overlay-exclusion fix so the solver no longer mis-reads its own markers.
Theme: new Neon (synthwave) theme with a fixed, readable theme selector.
UI: popup now stretches to full width in the Chrome side panel and shows the build commit hash in the header.
